de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Interface UpdateableOperator

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Named, Operator, ParsableVariable, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    LocationVariable, ProgramSV

    public interface UpdateableOperator
extends SortedOperator, ParsableVariable
    Operators implementing this interface may stand for locations as well. This means e.g. occur as top level operators on the left side of an assignment pair of an update.

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.SortedOperator

        argSort, argSorts, sort

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.Operator

        arity, bindVarsAt, isRigid, sort, validTopLevel

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Named

        name
